case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. ANTHONY DOROLIAT ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100049081) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
MINI MINUTES FOR MAR-10-2020 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING MAR-10-2020 AT 10:30 AM. THIS DISMISSAL IS PURSUANT TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-10-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
